footer.heading:
Empowering Women, 
Building Futures
footer.desc: SakhiHub is a women empowerment platform working for health awareness, education, and self-reliance across India.
footer.proprietorship: SakhiHub is a Sole Proprietorship owned and operated by Anil Raseniya

hero.title: Empowering Women, Transforming Lives
hero.subtitle: Join the movement dedicated to health, hygiene, and financial independence for every woman in India.

impact.womenEmpoweredDesc: Building a strong women network across India
impact.fieldTeamDesc: Working at ground level across districts

whatWeDo.title: Empowering Through Action
whatWeDo.desc: SakhiHub works at ground level to create awareness, build communities, and empower women for a better future.
whatWeDo.healthDesc: Promoting menstrual hygiene and overall women health through awareness campaigns.
whatWeDo.hygieneDesc: Providing scientific knowledge about hygiene, sanitation, and infection prevention.
whatWeDo.groupsDesc: Creating strong local women networks for support, safety, and growth.
whatWeDo.employmentDesc: Generating local job opportunities for women at block and village level.

1.title: Awareness
1.desc: Spreading knowledge about health and hygiene in villages.

3.desc: Providing skills and leadership development sessions.

5.title: Growth
5.desc: Building a self-reliant and confident future together.

team.title: The Hearts Behind SakhiHub
team.desc: Our field team works at the grassroots level, connecting directly with women in villages and communities. They conduct awareness sessions, build groups, and help women become confident, independent, and empowered.

sunita.name: Sunita Devi
sunita.story: After joining SakhiHub, I received the right information about hygiene and health, and today I am spreading awareness in my village.

rekha.name: Rekha Bai
rekha.story: I go door-to-door to educate women, and now I have become financially independent myself.

pooja.name: Pooja Sharma
pooja.story: We formed a women's group in our village, and now we all work together and earn a livelihood.

meena.name: Meena Kumari
meena.story: I want every woman in our district to stand on her own feet, and SakhiHub is helping completely in this mission.

whySakhi.title: Why We Stand Apart
whySakhi.desc: Built on trust, driven by impact, and focused on real change at ground level.

reach.title: Grassroots Reach

empowerment.title: Empowerment Focused

impact.desc: Thousands of women have already transformed their lives through SakhiHub.

liveImpact.title: Building Trust, Creating Change
liveImpact.desc: SakhiHub is more than just a platform; it is a promise to every woman in India. We work at the intersection of health, dignity, and economic independence.
liveImpact.featuredStory: "SakhiHub gave me the confidence to lead my village group and earn with dignity."
liveImpact.fastActivationDesc: New hubs activated within 48 hours of verification.

missionPage.title: Our Mission
missionPage.subtitle: Empowering women through information, health products, and skill development.
missionPage.p1: SakhiHub's mission is to provide women with accurate health information, period hygiene awareness, safe sanitary products, skill support, and employment opportunities. We work village to village through women's groups, awareness campaigns, training programs, and micro-industry initiatives to make women self-reliant.
missionPage.p2: Our objective is to reach every block and tehsil, building a healthy, aware, and empowered India.

visionPage.title: Our Vision
visionPage.subtitle: Creating a healthy, self-reliant, and respected network of women across India.
visionPage.p1: SakhiHub's vision is to connect every woman in India with health, hygiene, self-reliance, and respect. We aim to build a powerful women's network where women from every village can become aware, safe, confident, and economically strong.
visionPage.p2: Our goal is not just to spread awareness, but to connect women with a better life, better opportunities, and a better future.

campaignPage.title: Awareness Campaigns
campaignPage.subtitle: Bringing health and dignity to the heart of every village.
campaignPage.noCampaigns: No active campaigns at the moment.
campaignPage.checkBackSoon: Check back soon for new initiatives.
campaignPage.groundSubtitle: How we drive change every single day across rural districts.
campaignPage.groupAwarenessDesc: Interactive sessions with local women groups to discuss hygiene and health in a safe space.
campaignPage.directOutreachDesc: Door-to-door awareness and education by our dedicated block employees and field heroes.
campaignPage.productAccessDesc: Ensuring Sakhi Care Pads are reachable to every woman at affordable prices in their own village.
campaignPage.beChangeDesc: Whether you are an individual, a NGO, or a government body, let's collaborate to make India hygiene-safe.

healthPage.title: Health & Hygiene
healthPage.subtitle: Dedicated to promoting wellness and menstrual dignity for every woman in India.
healthPage.whyMattersDesc: In many parts of India, health and hygiene remain a challenge due to lack of awareness and accessibility. SakhiHub is on a mission to break the silence and provide tangible solutions.
healthPage.bullet1: Reducing school dropouts due to lack of sanitary products
healthPage.bullet2: Preventing infections and serious health issues
healthPage.bullet3: Empowering women to talk about their health openly
healthPage.bullet4: Building a network of village health volunteers
healthPage.statsDesc: Improvement in local health awareness in SakhiHub villages.
healthPage.coreSubtitle: Practical solutions on the ground for real impact.
healthPage.init1Desc: Providing high-quality, eco-friendly sanitary pads to women in rural and urban areas to ensure menstrual health.
healthPage.init2Desc: Regular workshops and camps led by medical professionals to educate women on wellness, nutrition, and hygiene.
healthPage.init3Desc: Forming local committees to monitor and support the health needs of the community at the grassroots level.
healthPage.ctaDesc: Whether you want to support our health camps or need products in your village, we are here for you.

employmentPage.title: Employment & Training
employmentPage.subtitle: Empowering women to build sustainable careers and achieve financial independence.
employmentPage.pathIndependenceDesc: At SakhiHub, we believe that true empowerment comes from the ability to earn and lead. Our employment programs are designed to provide stable income while building community leaders.
employmentPage.exploreDesc: We offer multiple ways for you to grow with the SakhiHub family.
employmentPage.opp1Desc: Join our core workforce. Visit villages, build communities, and distribute essential health products.
employmentPage.opp2Desc: Learn tailoring, digital literacy, and basic business management at our local training hubs.
employmentPage.opp3Desc: Experienced members can move up to management roles, overseeing operations in entire blocks or districts.
employmentPage.statsDesc: Women who have successfully trained and started earning with SakhiHub.

educationPage.title: Education & Awareness
educationPage.subtitle: Knowledge is the strongest tool for empowerment. We bridge the gap between information and action.
educationPage.breakingDesc: Many women are held back not by lack of talent, but by lack of information. Our education programs are designed to enlighten, inspire, and enable every woman to navigate the modern world with confidence.
educationPage.feat1Desc: Basic training on using smartphones, internet, and essential government apps for daily life.
educationPage.feat2Desc: Workshops on legal rights, financial safety, and social welfare schemes available for women.
educationPage.feat3Desc: Communication, leadership, and confidence-building sessions to prepare women for leadership roles.
educationPage.learningDesc: We establish physical centers in blocks where women can gather to learn from each other and from expert trainers. These hubs are the heart of our awareness campaigns.
educationPage.bullet4: Safe space for sharing and learning
educationPage.enrollDesc: Education is a right, not a privilege. Join our next workshop and take the first step towards a smarter, brighter future.

communityPage.title: Community Network
communityPage.subtitle: Building a powerful sisterhood where every woman supports another.
communityPage.unityDesc: Alone we are strong, but together we are unstoppable. SakhiHub creates local village groups where women can share resources, advice, and emotional support.
communityPage.bullet1Desc: Dedicated groups for every block to ensure no woman is left behind.
communityPage.bullet2Desc: A safe space for sharing personal and professional challenges.
communityPage.bullet3Desc: Financial assistance through community-led small savings.
communityPage.walkAloneDesc: Join the largest network of rural women in India. Be part of a group that understands you, supports you, and grows with you.

hiringPage.title: Join Our Mission
hiringPage.subtitle: Empower yourself while empowering thousands of women across India.
hiringPage.impactDesc: Be part of a movement that is changing the lives of 50,000+ women.
hiringPage.growthDesc: Regular leadership training and digital literacy for all employees.
hiringPage.stabilityDesc: Competitive salaries with travel allowance and performance bonuses.
hiringPage.openingsDesc: Find the role that matches your passion for social change.
hiringPage.locationDesc: Selected candidates will be assigned to their own or nearby blocks in their resident district.
hiringPage.statesDesc: UP, Bihar, MP, Rajasthan, Maharashtra & More
hiringPage.beyondDesc: At SakhiHub, we care for our people just as much as we care for the community. Every role comes with built-in support systems.

deliveryPage.title: Delivery Partner
deliveryPage.subtitle: Tehsil / Block Level Delivery Partner
deliveryPage.bizOppDesc: In the SakhiHub Delivery Partner model, the partner does not need to handle hiring, marketing, or group formation. The company provides ready orders, customers, product material, and full operational support. The partner is responsible for local product delivery within their assigned Tehsil/Block.

deliveryPage.jd3: Collecting payments for COD (Cash on Delivery) orders

partnerPage.area2Desc: Collaborative workshops for vocational skill building.
partnerPage.area3Desc: Expanding the network to reach the last mile.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.intro: At SakhiHub, accessible from www.sakhihub.com, one of our main priorities is the privacy of our platform users and coordinators. This Privacy Policy outlines the types of information collected and recorded by SakhiHub and how we utilize and protect it.
privacyPolicy.sec1Desc: We collect information required to facilitate campaign coordination, field workforce management, and platform compliance when you register, complete onboarding, or participate in operations. This includes:
privacyPolicy.sec1L1: Identity Verification Data: Full name, and government-issued identity documents for verification purposes.
privacyPolicy.sec1L2: Contact Data: Mobile number, email address, and operational/residential address.
privacyPolicy.sec1L3: Operational Team Structure Data: Vendor activation codes, employee identifiers, and operational team management data mapping.
privacyPolicy.sec1L4: Financial Data: Transaction details related to campaign participation fees, operational processing fees, and vendor activation fees.
privacyPolicy.sec2Desc: The information we collect is strictly used to maintain operational security, verify compliance, and run the platform features:
privacyPolicy.sec2L1: To operate, maintain, and verify authorization within our platform and team structure data.
privacyPolicy.sec2L2: To optimize, personalize, and improve field workforce efficiency and campaign tracking.
privacyPolicy.sec2L3: To audit, assess, and analyze platform usage and operational activity logs.
privacyPolicy.sec2L4: To develop new features, utilities, and integrations to simplify field coordination.
privacyPolicy.sec2L5: To communicate updates, notifications, operational alerts, and support details directly or through verified partners.
privacyPolicy.sec2L6: To process verified transactions, manage campaign participation fees, and process operational invoices.
privacyPolicy.sec2L7: To identify, prevent, and mitigate unauthorized activities or fraud.
privacyPolicy.sec3Desc: SakhiHub utilizes secure session identifiers, cookies, and local storage variables. These technologies are strictly used to keep you authenticated, store your display preferences, maintain dashboard session security, and optimize platform responsiveness.
privacyPolicy.sec4Desc: We employ enterprise-grade security protocols to safeguard your information. Sensitive data, including uploaded government-issued identity documents, is encrypted using Secure Socket Layer (SSL) and Industry-standard AES-256 encryption at rest. Access is strictly restricted to authorized compliance officers solely for verification purposes, and is not shared with any third party unless required by law.
privacyPolicy.sec5Desc: SakhiHub works with secure payment gateways (such as Razorpay/Cashfree) and SMS dispatch servers to handle payments and OTP delivery. These external partners process data under their respective security policies, and we advise reviewing their terms for complete financial compliance details.
privacyPolicy.sec6Desc: You retain full rights to request correction, restriction, or deletion of your operational profile data under applicable laws. If you have any inquiries, compliance questions, or wish to exercise your data rights, you may reach out directly to our support desk.
privacyPolicy.concernsDesc: We take your data seriously. Reach out to info@sakhihub.com

refundPolicy.title: Refund Policy
refundPolicy.intro: This Refund Policy outlines the guidelines, timelines, and conditions governing payments made on the SakhiHub platform. We are committed to transparency and clarity regarding campaign participation fees, activation fees, and processing fees.
refundPolicy.sec1Desc: Activation fees and campaign participation fees paid by vendors/partners are governed by the following operational refund criteria:
refundPolicy.sec1L1: Campaign Completion: Fees are typically refundable or adjusted upon the successful operational completion and verification of the assigned campaign target data.
refundPolicy.sec1L2: Pre-Commencement Cancellation: If a campaign is cancelled or suspended by the platform prior to its launch, the full campaign participation fee will be refunded.
refundPolicy.sec1L3: Early Termination: In the event of early termination or voluntary exit by the vendor after work allocations have been processed, the activation fee is non-refundable.
refundPolicy.sec2Desc: Platform access fees or membership fees paid by users to access campaigns and benefits are subject to the following rules:
refundPolicy.sec2L1: 3-Day Window: A full refund of the fee can be requested within 3 days of payment, provided no operational tools, campaign kits, or benefits have been claimed or utilized.
refundPolicy.sec2L2: Post-Utilization: Once a member has participated in any active campaign or received physical materials, all payments are strictly non-refundable.
refundPolicy.sec3Desc: All refund requests are subject to internal audit to verify transaction logs and operational milestones. Once approved by the compliance team, refunds are processed back to the original payment source within 5 to 7 business days, depending on bank settlement policies.
refundPolicy.sec4Desc: Users may choose to terminate their platform association at any time. However, any cancellation initiated after specific operational resources, team structure mappings, or logistics kits have been dispatched will incur a processing fee, which will be adjusted from any eligible refundable balance.
refundPolicy.sec5Desc: To initiate a review for a refund, please follow these steps:
refundPolicy.sec5L1: Login to your verified SakhiHub dashboard panel.
refundPolicy.sec5L3: Locate the specific transaction ID and submit an 'Audit & Refund' ticket.
refundPolicy.sec5L4: Alternatively, you can email us at info@sakhihub.com with your official transaction details and reason for the request.
refundPolicy.sec6Desc: Refunds or adjustments will not be processed in cases of duplicate submissions due to user error (unless audited as double-debit), breach of platform guidelines, falsification of identity documents, or operational non-performance. In cases of direct gateway technical failures where money is debited but not credited to the platform, refunds are automatically settled by the gateway.
refundPolicy.issuesDesc: Our compliance and finance team is here to help you. Reach out to info@sakhihub.com
refundPolicy.deliveryTimeText: Products will be delivered within 5-7 Days.

termsAndConditions.title: Terms and Conditions
termsAndConditions.intro: Welcome to SakhiHub. These Terms and Conditions govern your access to and use of the SakhiHub website and workforce management SaaS platform. By accessing the platform, registering, or managing operational workflows, you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms.
termsAndConditions.sec1Desc: SakhiHub is a SaaS-based operational workforce and campaign coordination platform. It is designed to assist administrators, vendors, sub-vendors, field staff, and members in managing team structure data, tracking field logistics, and verifying campaigns. The platform is strictly NOT a financial return scheme, referral earning system, multi-level marketing (MLM) platform, or investment network.
termsAndConditions.sec1L1: Users must provide authentic information and verified government-issued identity documents.
termsAndConditions.sec1L2: Account security and the confidentiality of login credentials are the sole responsibility of the user.
termsAndConditions.sec1L3: SakhiHub reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts in the event of policy violations or unauthorized activity.
termsAndConditions.vendorSubDesc: Responsible for managing local campaign coordinators, maintaining team structure data, and verifying the completion of field operations.
termsAndConditions.fieldStaffDesc: Responsible for conducting ground-level campaigns, logging operational activity, and verifying member credentials inside the dashboard.
termsAndConditions.sec3Desc: Participation in health awareness, hygiene, and field campaigns is subject to operational approvals. Vendors may be required to pay a campaign participation fee or vendor activation fee to cover material distribution and dashboard onboarding. All campaign metrics must be logged honestly in real-time.
termsAndConditions.sec4Desc: All payments, including campaign participation fees and platform activation charges, are processed through secure Indian payment gateways. These payments are operational processing charges and are governed under the platform's Refund Policy.
termsAndConditions.sec5Desc: Platform users are strictly prohibited from the following actions:
termsAndConditions.sec5L1: Falsifying identity data, uploading forged government-issued identity documents, or manipulating campaign logs.
termsAndConditions.sec5L2: Collecting unauthorized fees, cash payments, or charges outside the official system.
termsAndConditions.sec5L3: Engaging in activities that defame, harass, or disrupt local communities or platform security.
termsAndConditions.sec5L4: Attempting to bypass the operational team structure verification or validation systems.
termsAndConditions.sec6Desc: SakhiHub provides workforce coordination tools and is not liable for any direct, indirect, or incidental operational losses or community disputes. Users agree to indemnify and hold SakhiHub harmless from any liabilities, claims, or expenses arising from their breach of these Terms or ground-level campaign execution.
termsAndConditions.questionsDesc: Contact our legal team at info@sakhihub.com

aboutPage.heroDesc: SakhiHub is not just an organization; it is a revolution born from the grassroots, dedicated to bringing dignity, health, and independence to every woman.
aboutPage.p1: The journey of SakhiHub began in small village meetings, where we noticed a profound gap between available resources and the women who needed them most. Health, hygiene, and financial stability were often treated as luxuries rather than rights.
aboutPage.p2: We realized that true empowerment doesn't come from outside; it comes from within the community. We started by building groups of local women who could support each other, share knowledge, and grow together.
aboutPage.p3: Today, SakhiHub has grown into a powerful network of over 50,000 women, driven by the same spirit of sisterhood and collective progress that sparked our first meeting.
aboutPage.quote: Empowerment is not just about giving a woman a tool; it's about reminding her she has the power to use it.
aboutPage.valTrustDesc: Building long-term relationships with every village community.
aboutPage.valEmpDesc: Focusing on skill-building and long-term independence.
aboutPage.valIncDesc: Leaving no woman behind, regardless of her background.
aboutPage.valImpactDesc: Measuring success through real lives changed, not just numbers.
aboutPage.valSisDesc: Creating a safe space where women support women.
aboutPage.valTransDesc: Full accountability in every program and campaign.
aboutPage.visionDesc: We envision an India where every woman has the resources to look after her health, the education to make her own choices, and the career to stand on her own feet. Our roadmap involves expanding to 100+ districts by 2026, reaching over 1 million women.
aboutPage.visHealthDesc: No woman should suffer due to lack of hygiene knowledge.
aboutPage.visFinDesc: Every SakhiHub member should have a sustainable source of income.
aboutPage.visDigDesc: Connecting rural women with modern digital tools and opportunities.
aboutPage.teamDesc: Our team is composed of passionate social workers, health experts, and community leaders who work 24/7 to ensure SakhiHub's mission reaches the last mile.
aboutPage.joinDesc: Whether as a member, a volunteer, or a partner, your contribution can change a life today.
